title: metopium gentlei
intro: Metopium gentlei is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as poison tree due to its toxic nature. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Metopium gentlei include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever and digestive issues.
